overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The journey begins at a street corner with palm trees and elevated highways, progresses past glowing storefronts and massive digital billboards, and ends at a crosswalk beneath an overpass. The environment features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with cyan and orange neon signage, towering glass buildings, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street corner with elevated highway overpass

events.description: pedestrians in yellow coat and dark clothing walk past the camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of a futuristic city street, navigating around a palm tree planter

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow coat walking toward camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: large curved concrete overpass with glowing lights underneath and traffic signs mounted on pillars
tall palm tree in circular concrete planter situated on the sidewalk
cyan neon sign reading WILL'S on the facade of a modern building
multi-story building with teal-tinted glass windows and illuminated interiors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city street corner at night, with a large elevated highway curving overhead to the left. A palm tree in a concrete planter sits on the sidewalk near a building with a glowing cyan WILL'S sign. Pedestrians walk past as the camera moves forward along the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

events.description: passing the green PHARMACEUTICALS neon sign as the sidewalk enters deeper shadow under the highway
large digital billboard with blue-haired character becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing various storefronts and neon signs

entered.detail: green neon sign reading PHARMACEUTICALS on building facade
massive vertical digital billboard displaying an animated character with blue hair and glowing eyes

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the environment becomes more enclosed with the concrete structure looming overhead. The camera passes a green PHARMACEUTICALS sign and continues toward a massive digital billboard visible in the distance. The sidewalk is shaded and flanked by futuristic buildings with glowing accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large digital advertisements and outdoor dining

events.description: passing the CALIENTE restaurant with bright orange neon signage and outdoor seating area
navigating around construction barriers that narrow the sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking past the CALIENTE restaurant and construction barriers, approaching the large digital billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the billboard

entered.detail: building with bright orange neon CALIENTE signage, red umbrellas, and outdoor seating area
yellow and black striped barriers with red railings blocking off a construction zone
tall palm tree on sidewalk near the digital billboard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up slightly as the camera approaches the massive digital billboard displaying the blue-haired character. The CALIENTE restaurant with its bright orange signage dominates the right side, while construction barriers line the edge of the sidewalk. The elevated highway recedes into the background as the camera moves past the palm tree toward the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor under highway overpass with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the highway overpass with fluorescent lighting
approaching crosswalk with vehicles moving on the road and pedestrians waiting to cross

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass toward a crosswalk with waiting pedestrians and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving along the road under the highway overpass

entered.detail: concrete ceiling and support columns of the highway overpass with linear fluorescent lighting
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface
tall black pole with traffic signals and directional signs indicating Europa

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the shadowy underpass beneath the highway, illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The environment transitions to a transit corridor with a crosswalk ahead marked by bold yellow stripes. Vehicles drive past on the left while pedestrians wait near the traffic light pole, and the concrete infrastructure dominates the visual field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from an open street corner into the oppressive concrete shadows of a highway underpass. It begins on a sidewalk beside a palm tree and a glowing cyan sign, moving forward as a massive elevated highway curves overhead to the left. As the camera passes beneath the concrete structure, the environment becomes more enclosed and shaded, gliding past a green pharmaceutical sign toward a towering digital billboard in the distance. The scene then opens up briefly to reveal the bright orange signage of a Caliente restaurant and construction barriers before the camera pushes forward past another palm tree. Finally, the view shifts into a dim transit corridor illuminated by fluorescent lights, ending at a yellow-striped crosswalk where vehicles and pedestrians gather beneath the heavy concrete infrastructure.
